data.title: A whale spent $571,800 to participate in the XPL public sale, and has now made over $11 million in profit.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, the whale @RegbilTrades (0x503...35c6) spent $571,800 to participate in the XPL public sale, purchasing 11.44 million XPL at a price of $0.05, currently valued at $11.8 million. Its profit has exceeded $11 million, a 19x return.

data.title: China strikes back at Mexico for tariffs, adds anti-dumping pecan probe
data.description:
China has launched a direct trade investigation targeting Mexico, after the Latin American country announced aggressive new tariffs on Chinese exports. The decision came Thursday, as China’s Ministry of Commerce confirmed it would probe not only Mexico’s 50% tariff on Chinese cars, but also a list of other new trade measures. The same day, China […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-strikes-back-at-mexico-for-tariffs/

data.title: A whale profited over $47.7 million by participating in the Plasma public sale
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0x790c...1023) deposited 50 million USDT into Plasma, securing $2.7 million in public sale quota. This whale purchased 54.09 million XPL at $0.05 (currently $50.4 million), resulting in a current profit exceeding $47.7 million.

data.title: A whale sold 233,000 LINK and deposited 10,000 LINK to OKX
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale sold 233,094 LINK at $20.8 in exchange for $4.85 million in USDC, and deposited 10,000 LINK worth $209,000 to OKX.
